tools.name: quote
tools.description: Submit a task description and receive dollar quotes from multiple frontier AI models before any work is done. Returns the request id, quotes with prices in cents, and a recommendation.

tools.name: accept
tools.description: Accept one quote on a request. The chosen model executes the task. Poll get_deliverable for the result.

tools.name: get_deliverable
tools.description: Get the status and deliverable of a request. Status: quoting, quoted, executing, completed, failed.

tools.name: rerun
tools.description: Quality guarantee: re-run a completed request once for free if its deliverable scored below 70/100 on the automated quality check. Produces a fresh deliverable with the same accepted quote.

tools.name: spend
tools.description: Get your QuoteFirst spend this month in cents, total and broken down by model.

tools.name: estimate_cost
tools.description: Deterministic cost estimate across all models for a task, without using a quote from your allowance. Optionally pass expected_output_words.
